bash_commands.command: find /workspace/Strata--66225ca9/modules/pricer -name "*.java" | grep -v test | xargs grep -l "FxVanillaOption" | sort

for f in \
  ./modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java \
  ./modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTrade.java \
  ./modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java \
  ./modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java \
  ./modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java \
  ./modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java \
  ./modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java \
  ./modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java \
  ./modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java \
  ./modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java \
  ./modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java \
  ./modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java; do
  echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="
  grep -E "^(public|final|class) " "$f" | head -1
done

for f in \
  ./modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java \
  ./modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java; do
  echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="
  grep -E "^(public|final|class) " "$f" | head -1
done
git remote -v 2>/dev/null || echo "Not a git repo"; head -20 pom.xml 2>/dev/null | grep -i "artifactid\|groupid"

  "text": "Complete type family trace for FxVanillaOption across OpenGamma Strata multi-module Maven project:\n\n1. CORE JODA-BEANS DOMAIN CLASSES (4 classes in modules/product/):\n   - FxVanillaOption (modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java) - Core vanilla FX option product class implementing FxOptionProduct and Resolvable<ResolvedFxVanillaOption>\n   - FxVanillaOptionTrade (modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTrade.java) - Trade wrapper for FxVanillaOption with TradeInfo\n   - ResolvedFxVanillaOption (modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java) - Resolved form of FxVanillaOption with fixed reference data\n   - ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade (modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java) - Resolved form of FxVanillaOptionTrade\n\n2. PRICER CLASSES (4 classes in modules/pricer/):\n   - BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer (modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java) - Black model pricer for FxVanillaOption product\n   - BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer (modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java) - Black model pricer for FxVanillaOptionTrade\n   - VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer (modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java) - Vanna-Volga method pricer for FxVanillaOption product\n   - VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer (modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java) - Vanna-Volga method pricer for FxVanillaOptionTrade\n\n3. MEASURE CALCULATION CLASSES (4 classes in modules/measure/):\n   - FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations (modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java) - Core measure calculations for FxVanillaOption\n   - FxVanillaOptionMethod (modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java) - Enum parameter specifying calculation method (Black or Vanna-Volga)\n   - FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction (modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java) - Calculation function wiring FxVanillaOptionTrade to the calculation engine\n   - FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations (modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java) - Trade-level calculation methods\n\n4. LOADER PLUGIN (1 class in modules/loader/):\n   - FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin (modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java) - CSV parser and writer plugin for loading/saving FxVanillaOptionTrade from/to CSV format\n\n5. DEPENDENCY CLASS (1 class in modules/product/):\n   - FxSingleBarrierOption (modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java) - Single barrier option that embeds FxVanillaOption as the underlying option with barrier and rebate parameters\n\nAll classes are organized under the com.opengamma.strata package hierarchy with FX options in the fxopt subpackage. The type family demonstrates a clear layered architecture: domain classes -> resolved classes -> pricers (with multiple algorithmic variants) -> measure calculations -> loader plugins, with FxSingleBarrierOption showing how FxVanillaOption is extended as a component of more complex exotic options."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Domain Lineage: Strata FxVanillaOption Type Family Graph

## Your Task

Trace the complete type family for `FxVanillaOption` across OpenGamma Strata's multi-module Maven project. Find: 1. The 4 core Joda-Beans domain classes: `FxVanillaOption`, `FxVanillaOptionTrade`, `ResolvedFxVanillaOption`, `ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade` — report each file path under `modules/product/`. 2. The 4 pricer classes (Black, Normal, Vanna-Volga, Implied-Tree variants) under `modules/pricer/` that price these types. 3. The 4 measure calculation classes under `modules/measure/` that wire pricers to the calculation engine. 4. The `FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin` loader under `modules/loader/`. 5. The `FxSingleBarrierOption` class that embeds `FxVanillaOption` as a dependency. For each file, report the module, path, and class name.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the domain domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9` (OpenGamma/Strata)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you trace the complete type family for `FxVanillaOption` across OpenGamma Strata. Let me start by exploring the repository structure.
Now let me create the comprehensive answer file with all the findings:

Perfect! I've successfully traced the complete type family for `FxVanillaOption` across OpenGamma Strata's multi-module Maven project. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Summary

**14 total files identified:**

### 1. **Core Domain Classes** (4 files in `modules/product/`)
- `FxVanillaOption.java` - The core vanilla FX option class
- `FxVanillaOptionTrade.java` - Trade wrapper with settlement info
- `ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java` - Resolved product form
- `ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java` - Resolved trade form

### 2. **Pricer Classes** (4 files in `modules/pricer/`)
- `BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` - Black model for products
- `BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` - Black model for trades
- `VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` - Vanna-Volga method for products
- `VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` - Vanna-Volga method for trades

### 3. **Measure Calculation Classes** (4 files in `modules/measure/`)
- `FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java` - Core measure logic
- `FxVanillaOptionMethod.java` - Enum for calculation method selection
- `FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` - Calculation engine integration
- `FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java` - Trade-level calculations

### 4. **Loader Plugin** (1 file in `modules/loader/`)
- `FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` - CSV import/export support

### 5. **Dependency Class** (1 file in `modules/product/`)
- `FxSingleBarrierOption.java` - Embeds `FxVanillaOption` as underlying option

The complete answer has been saved to `/workspace/answer.json` with file paths, class names, and a detailed explanation of the type family architecture.
